title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 274.120 - Officers elected by directors
text:
274.120.  Officers elected by directors. — The directors shall elect from their number a president and one or more vice presidents.  They shall also elect a secretary and a treasurer, who need not be directors or members of the association; and they may combine the two latter offices and designate the combined office as secretary-treasurer; or unite both functions and titles in one person.  The bylaws may provide for the election of the president and vice president by the members, or their delegates, at annual meetings.
(RSMo 1939 § 14343, A.L. 1945 p. 78) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12685
